342337.「お集まりの 皆さまぁ～っ！ 記念すべき\n 第１３回 アストルティア・ナイト\:
Welcome, ladies and gents! It's time to
introduce our memorable contestants
of the 13th Astoltia Knight Contest!

342338.「前大会で 好成績をおさめ \n 見事 出場権を獲得した ３名に加えて……:
In addition to our three excellent contestants
from last year who were qualified to
participate this year, we have...

342339.「総勢４８人による 激闘の予選を\n 見事勝ち抜いた 精鋭 ５名！ \n あわせ:
...Five elite contestants who made it through
some fierce preliminaries out of 48!
8 hotties will battle it out!

342340.「まずは まずは 前大会の覇者の 入場だっ！\n 勝者の晴れ舞台に ふさわしく…:
First up, we have our winner from last year!
Totally rocking the outfit of a true winner,
he makes his dazzling entrance!

342341.「夫婦そろって クイーンとナイトに輝くという\n 前代未聞の 偉業を成しとげた:
A reliable guy who not only became Knight, but
was the first ever to be crowned next to his
wife as Queen! The Top Time Traveler, Padre!

342342.「俺はついに 念願の アストルティア・ナイトに\n なることができた。すべては:
I was finally able to fulfill my dream of
becoming an Astoltia Knight, and it's because
of you all. I will forever treasure this joy.

342343.「しかも……まさか マローネと 夫婦そろって\n クイーンとナイトに なれるとは:
On top of that... I never would have imagined Marone and I would become both Queen and Knight together... Nothing could make me
happier. Thank you, truly...

342344.「だが……俺は 頂点を極めたからといって\n ここで 満足するつもりはない！\n:
However...simply reaching the top is not
enough! I will do everything in my power to
defend this title!

342345.「続いては 準ナイトの おでましだぁ～っ！！\n 初登場ながら いきなり２位の:
Next, we have our runner up! Despite this being his first appearance, he's already jumped to second place! Talk about a rising
star!

342346.「まっすぐな瞳は 新たな主神へと 進化の途中！\n がんばる彼に ご褒美あげたい:
Those straightforward eyes will lead him on the path as the new Almighty! He's trying oh so hard, so I just want to spoil him rotten!
The Boy Wolf of the Unknown...Lycae!

342347.「……前回 ここに来て わかった。\n みんなを 笑顔にする\n アストルティア:
It was last time that Lycae realized it...
This contest is amazing. It makes everyone
smile...

342348.「ラキは アストルティア・ナイトに なりたい。\n そうすれば もっと みんなの:
Lycae wants to be Astoltia Knight! If he does,
then he knows he can make this world
happier...and everyone in it happier, too!

342349.「さあ お待ちかね！ 今年も アイツの登場だ！\n 初回コンテスト出場から ４回:
The wait's finally over! Making his appearance yet again, he's won four times since his first contest, always placing at least third! What
tough contender to beat!

342350.「最近 ツッコミとしての切れ味も一流と評判！\n 皆の心に殿堂入りの 国民的ヒー:
He's even gained quite the reputation for his sharpness as of late! A national hero who's won the hearts of those all over! You know
him, you love himーthe Lone Swordsman, Hyuza!

342351.「……ここんとこ 圧の強いヤツらと\n 行動していたせいか おかしなところばっか:
I've been hanging around some pretty pushy
people lately, so my quirks are starting to
show... That's no good.

342352.「だが 強敵と戦うことこそ オレの本領だ。\n もう一度 ナイトの座を取りもどし:
But fighting formidable foes is where I
really shine. I'll take back my title and
prove they're no match for me!

342353.「一番 アストルティア・ナイトに相応しいのが\n 誰なのか……あんたらも わかっ:
You all know who's most worthy of being
Knight, don't you? I'm going all out here, so
you'd better keep up, got it?

342354.「ここからは 総勢４８人による 激しい予選を\n 見事勝ち抜いた 精鋭５名を ご:
And now, we will introduce our five elite contestants who made it through the preliminaries! First upーthis guy ranked in
for the first time in five years!

342355.「アストルティアへの 激重な愛を語らせたら最後\n 彼のマシンガントークを 止め:
Once he starts talking about his love for
Astoltia, good luck getting him to stop! The
Graceful Demon King returns! It's Asbal!

342356.「ああ！ これって 夢じゃないんだよね？\n また ここに戻れて 本当に うれし:
Ah...this isn't a dream, right?! I can't tell
you how happy I am to be back here...
It really is the Knight contest!

342357.「みんな 僕にチャンスをくれて ありがとう！\n 出られたからには 僕の有能なる:
Thank you all for giving me this chance! Now that I am here, together with my capable subject... I will give this my all and enjoy
myself as much as I can!

342358.「というわけで リソル！ せっかく一緒なんだし\n コンテストで僕たちが いい成:
So, Resol! Since we're in this together, why
not celebrate if we both place well? We can
even wear matching outfits!

342359.「はあ！？ ペアルックとか バカじゃないの？\n 絶対に お断りなんだけど！:
Come again?! Matching outfits?!
Not in a million years!

342360.「いよっ！ この毒舌を 待っていました！\n お次は 熱狂的ファンを抱える この:
Yess! That's just the snapback I was waiting for! Next up...this guy's got a legion of passionate fans! Once you fall for his charm,
good luck getting back up!

342361.「今年は ついに ご主人様と そろって登場！\n いつもと違った レアな彼が 見:
Finally, he appears next to his master this year! Maybe we'll get to see some rare, unknown side to him this time?! It's the
Baffling BambinoーResol!

342362.「今年こそ 絶対に サボろうと 思ったのに\n 一番やっかいなヒトと 一緒になっ:
I was really meaning to skip school this year,
but talk about bad luck... I got stuck with
quite possibly the most annoying person ever.

342363.「まあ でも？ このヒトが暴走しても\n 先輩が 何とかしてくれるんだよね？\n:
Well...even if you-know-who goes crazy
again, you'll handle it, right? I'm
reeeeally counting on you, teach. ♪

342364.「う～ん 残念だなあ。 \n 君と カワイイ衣装で ペアルックにしたら\n 絶対:
Aw, that's too bad... I really think it'd be
so much fun to wear matching outfits with
you...

342365.「あのさぁ……。\n いい加減 もう 黙っててくれない？: Hey... Can you just shut up already?

342366.「自由奔放すぎる主に 振り回される大変さ……。\n 痛いほど わかりますよ。:
How troublesome it is to be at the mercy of
a much too free-spirited master...
I understand it all too well.

342367.「さっすが 大人の余裕といえば このお方！\n お次に登場するのは 魔界随一の:
Now that's some mature composure! Up next, the Demon World's best man who gets things done! Will he finally get his revenge after
hiding in the shadows?

342368.「冷静沈着 頭脳明晰！ だが 主への忠誠心は\n ジャリムバハ砂漠の熱砂よりも:
He's calm, collected, and intelligent! But even the hot Jyarimbaha sands can't beat the heat of his loyalty towards his master!
The One-Eyed Wonder... Najinn!

342369.「ようやく 役者がそろって 我々の見せ場と\n 思っていたら……今年は 隣国ゼク:
Just when I thought all the key players were
finally here... Our rivals from Zechres seem
to be making quite a fuss this year.

342370.「ですが ナイトの座に ふさわしいのは……\n 我ら ファラザード陣営であること:
But we of Farazard will prove that we are
worthy to claim the Knight's throne.

342371.「そうでしょう？ ユシュカ。\n 我が主……ファラザードの王よ！:
Don't you agree, Yushka?
My lord...and king of Farazard!

342373.「待ってました～！ 主役は 遅れてやってくる！ \n 満を持して ファラザードの:
Finally, he's here! The leading role always
arrives last! At long lastーFarazard's twin
pillars are together again!

342374.「有能なる片腕と チカラを合わせ\n ついに アストルティア・ナイトに輝くか！？:
Will he finally shine as Astoltia Knight with
the help of his right-hand?! It's the Demon
World's Prodigy, Yushka!

342375.「魔界で一番 ナイトにふさわしいのは 誰か……\n 副官殿に 助けられるばかりじ:
Just who in the Demon World is most worthy of being Knight...? My right-hand alone won't cut it anymore. It's high time I started showing
my authority as a king.

342376.「さあ 俺の手を取れ。\n 誰も見たことのない景色を 見せてやるよ。:
Come, take my hand...
I'll show you a view the likes you've
never seen before!

342377.「いよいよ 最後に登場するのは \n ミステリアスな魅力で 常に上位の このお方:
And finally, our last contestant always ranks
high due to his mysterious charm! Burn his
image into your mind!

342378.「冷たいゴーグルの奥に秘めた 熱きココロ！\n 一途に追うのは 唯一無二の 果て:
A passionate heart, hidden behind those cold
goggles! He single-mindedly chases after an
endless illusion! The Smart Seeker, Rahul!

342379.「どれほど求めても……月に 手は届かない。\n あの娘のために どんな宝も 手に:
No matter how much I reach for it...I just
can't grasp the moon. I promised that I'd
find any treasure for her... And yet...

342380.「ふたりで 一緒に…………約束よ。: The two of us, together... it's a promise.

342381.「いつだって……\n 俺に チカラをくれるのは キミなんだな。:
You've always been the one who gives me
strength...

342382.「俺は もう一度 ナイトの座を手に入れる！\n いつか胸を張って キミと再会でき:
So that I can one day see you again, with my
head held high...and for all who support me...
I will claim the title of Knight once more!

342383.「以上っ！ ８名のイケメンが\n ナイトの座をかけ コンテストを争っちゃうよ！:
And that's all, folks! These eight handsome
men will compete for the title of Knight!

342384.「栄光の座に かがやくのは 誰か……\n それを決めるのは！\n こ・こ・に・い:
Who will be crowned with glory...? It's up to
you to decide! All! Of! You!

342385.「さ～て どう？ どう？ <pc>。 \n ちょーイケメンが 大集合だけど\n:
Well? Well? There are so many gorgeous men
here, but which one is your honest favorite?

342386.「アストルティア・ナイトに ふさわしいと思う \n イケメンを選んだら\n キミ:
When you've made your choice of who you think
is worthy, make sure to cast your vote!

342387.「投票は 私の カワイイ妹っ！\n 集計係モカの所で 受け付けてるからね！: Give your votes to my cute sister, Mocha!

342388.「ナイトに 投票し終わったら\n 話すことがあるから メリルの所に 来るべし！\:
After you've chosen your votes, come see me!
I'll be waiting for you outside, I promise!

342389.「じゃじゃーん！ 記念すべき \n 第１３回 アストルティア・ナイト\n コンテ:
Ta-dah! I will now announce the results of
the 12th Astoltia Knight Contest!

342390.「さあさあ！ ホワイトショコラ城の\n ナイトの座は 誰の手に！？\n 耳の穴か:
Come, now! Who will be the Knight of the
White Chocolate Castle? Clear your ears and
listen well!

342391.「いっくよ～！\n みんなっ ステージに 注目するべ～しっ！！:
Here we go!
Ladies and gentlemen, please turn your
attention to the stage!!
